title: がびがびスパゲッティ

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What is this garbage code? There's unnecessary
repetition all over the place.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, why reuse variables like this? There's no
naming conventions or anything—it's a total mess.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Agh! Damn it all to hell! How deep do you plan to
make me dig?! I'm not a damn archaeologist!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur is stressing out over someone's poorly
written spaghetti code.
